title: USSD Code
description: A single USSD/MMI code as consumed by the My USSD Codes apps.

id.description: Unique, stable identifier (kebab-case). Must be unique across the whole catalog.

name.description: Short human-readable name shown in the app.

description.description: What the code does, in one or two sentences.

code.description: The dial string. May contain {placeholders} declared in `variables`.

category.description: Category used by the Sections tab (e.g. "Balance", "Call forwarding").

variables.description: Inputs the app asks for before dialing. Every {placeholder} in `code` must be declared here.

key.description: Placeholder name as it appears inside braces in `code`.

type.description: Input type, controls the keyboard shown by the app.

hint.description: Optional example value or extra guidance.

dangerous.description: True for codes that can lock a SIM, erase settings or cost money. The apps warn before running them.

source.description: Where the code comes from (spec, carrier page, tested device).
